overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a sci-fi horror game showing a character in a prison uniform exploring a dark industrial facility. The character moves through corridors with red and yellow emergency lighting, acquires a weapon from a locker, hacks a security door using a wrist device, and explores a medical bay.

events.description: moving from B2 corridor into red-lit industrial maintenance area

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a dark prison corridor marked with B2 signage

chain-link metal fencing along the corridor wall
red-lit rectangular supply crate on the floor
metal doorway leading to red-lit industrial section

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow prison corridor marked with B2 level signage. Metal mesh fencing lines the left wall while an emergency crate sits on the right. The scene transitions into a red-lit industrial maintenance area as the character approaches a doorway.

scene_state.functional_zone: maintenance corridor with yellow emergency lighting

events.description: turning left to enter a side locker room
opening a wall locker and acquiring a red crowbar-like weapon

agents.ego_description: entering a side room and interacting with a wall locker to retrieve a weapon

metal storage locker embedded in the wall
heavy industrial security door at the end of the corridor

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a yellow-lit maintenance corridor and enters a side room containing a wall locker. After opening the locker and retrieving a red weapon, the character returns to the main corridor.

events.description: attempting to open the security door
access denied message appears with red warning light above door
turning around to backtrack through the corridor

agents.ego_description: attempting to open a locked security door, receiving access denied, then backtracking to find an alternate route

door control panel displaying red access denied message

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a security door at the end of the yellow corridor and attempts to open it, but receives an access denied message accompanied by a red warning light. The character then turns around and backtracks through the corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: security door with hackable access panel

events.description: using wrist-mounted device to hack the door control panel

agents.ego_description: using a wrist-mounted hacking device to bypass the security door lock

close-up of wrist-mounted device showing hacking progress bars
doorway opening into a brightly lit medical facility

segments.scene_description: Back in the B2 area, the character locates a hackable door panel and uses a wrist-mounted device to bypass the security lock. After a brief hacking sequence, the door opens to reveal the medical bay interior.

scene_state.functional_zone: medical bay reception and treatment room

events.description: entering the treatment room through a sliding glass door
searching wall cabinets and finding medical supplies

agents.ego_description: exploring the medical bay, entering a treatment room, and searching storage cabinets for supplies

entered.detail: circular reception area with central information desk
small medical room with examination table and equipment
white medical storage cabinets mounted on the wall
padded examination table with medical supplies on top

segments.scene_description: The character enters a modern medical bay with cool blue-green lighting and a circular reception desk. After approaching a treatment room, the character enters and searches the wall cabinets, retrieving items from the storage compartments.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a claustrophobic industrial prison complex that gradually opens into a sterile medical facility. It begins in a narrow B2 level corridor lined with metal mesh fencing, moving through a transition of red-lit maintenance areas into a yellow-lit corridor where the character retrieves a red weapon from a wall locker. As the camera reaches a security door, a red warning light signals access denied, prompting a backtrack through the yellow halls toward a hackable panel in the B2 area. The scene then shifts as a wrist-mounted device bypasses the lock, allowing the camera to pass through the opening door into a modern medical bay bathed in cool blue-green lighting. Finally, the movement leads past a circular reception desk and into a treatment room, where the character searches through wall cabinets and storage compartments.
